scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-core && npm run typecheck -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests && npm run typecheck -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-evals
scripts.test: npm run test -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-core && npm run test -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests && npm run test -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-evals
scripts.pack:check: npm run pack:check -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests && npm run pack:check -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-evals
scripts.check: npm run check -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-core && npm run check -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests && npm run check -w @m-mohamed/pi-quests-evals
